data.body: AC amendment: Specify CLI commands for child discovery — use 'ticket deps <id> --include-archived' to get child IDs (includes archived), then 'ticket show <child-id>' per child to read status. Classify: status=closed OR archived=true → closed (read-only); status=in_progress → in-progress (flagged); status=open → open (eligible). Guard applies BEFORE Epic Type Detection, and covers both epic-direct mode (children=tasks under epic) and story mode (children=tasks under story).
